items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of transferring bookings between locations.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of 'Transfer bookings between locations', but the provided evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario where appointments are auto-transferred to the nearest location, there is no specific evidence or data to confirm that this feature is implemented in the system. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to conclude whether this requirement is satisfied.
